D) All of these
72. Mendel’s results on the inheritance of
characters were rediscovered by: (Pg. 81,
E)
A) de Vries B) Correns
C) von Tschermak D) all of these
73. Among the following, who noted that the
behaviour of chromosomes was parallel to
the behavior of genes?
A) Walter Sutton B) Theodore Boveri
C) Von Tschermak D) Both (A) and (B)
74. Refer to the given figure showing meiosis
and germ cell formation in a cell with four
chromosomes. Which law of Mendel can be
effectively explained by this figure? (Pg.
81, M)

anaphase anaphase

A) Law of dominance
B) Law of segregation
C) Law of independent assortment
D) All of these
75. The chromosomal theory of inheritance
was proposed by (Pg. 83, E)
A) Sutton B) Boveri
C) Morgan D) Both (A) and (B)
